image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills hallway and storage joinery after renovation
image:image.image:caption: Beaumont Hills project hero image

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills hallway storage and concealed doors
image:image.image:caption: Hallway storage and concealed door detail from the Beaumont Hills renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills vanity and hallway joinery detail
image:image.image:caption: Joinery detail showing how the Beaumont Hills renovation ties the vanity zone into the hallway storage.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills built-in hallway cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Built-in hallway cabinetry from the Beaumont Hills renovation with a more resolved wall finish.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills ceiling lighting and bulkhead detail
image:image.image:caption: Lighting and bulkhead detail from the Beaumont Hills renovation showing the cleaner finished ceiling line.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills full-height storage wall
image:image.image:caption: Full-height storage wall from the completed Beaumont Hills home renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills walk-in wardrobe with open shelving and display lighting
image:image.image:caption: Walk-in wardrobe with full-height open shelving and integrated display lighting from the Beaumont Hills renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills bathroom vanity with timber-look cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Bathroom vanity with timber-look cabinetry and stone benchtop from the Beaumont Hills renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills bathroom with freestanding bath and custom joinery
image:image.image:caption: Bathroom with freestanding bath, custom joinery and a cleaner wall finish from the Beaumont Hills renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills bathroom mirror cabinet and vanity storage
image:image.image:caption: Mirror cabinet and vanity storage detail from the Beaumont Hills bathroom renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills vanity joinery detail with integrated lighting
image:image.image:caption: Vanity joinery detail with integrated lighting from the completed Beaumont Hills renovation.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills entry before renovation
image:image.image:caption: Entry area before the Beaumont Hills joinery and renovation upgrades.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills study or storage zone before joinery
image:image.image:caption: Existing room condition before the new storage wall and built-in joinery were installed.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills hallway before built-in storage
image:image.image:caption: Hallway view before the new lighting, cladding and built-in storage package.

image:image.image:title: Beaumont Hills room before renovation finish work
image:image.image:caption: Room condition before the Beaumont Hills renovation finishes were completed.

image:image.image:title: Carlton kitchen remodel with two-tone cabinetry and stone splashback
image:image.image:caption: Carlton project hero image

image:image.image:title: Carlton kitchen cabinet and splashback detail
image:image.image:caption: Closer kitchen detail from Carlton showing the cabinetry finish and splashback treatment.

image:image.image:title: Carlton kitchen before renovation
image:image.image:caption: Original Carlton kitchen before the cabinetry, benchtop and splashback update.

image:image.image:title: Castle Hill kitchen renovation with white shaker cabinetry, island bench and pendant lights
image:image.image:caption: Castle Hill project hero image

image:image.image:title: Castle Hill completed laundry with teal splashback, overhead storage and side-by-side appliances
image:image.image:caption: Completed laundry with full-height overhead cabinetry, stone benchtop, teal subway tile splashback and side-by-side black appliances.

image:image.image:title: Castle Hill kitchen before renovation — original timber cabinetry and dark benchtop
image:image.image:caption: The original Castle Hill kitchen before renovation — dated timber cabinetry, dark benchtop and an island that made the room feel heavy and closed in.

image:image.image:title: Castle Hill laundry before renovation — original tub and top-loader
image:image.image:caption: The original laundry before the renovation — exposed tub, top-loader and no proper storage or benchtop.

image:image.image:title: Cremorne custom joinery wardrobes and laundry fitout
image:image.image:caption: Cremorne project hero image

image:image.image:title: Cremorne wardrobe slim shaker finish
image:image.image:caption: Slim shaker wardrobe doors in a clean polyurethane finish with a more tailored, built-in feel.

image:image.image:title: Cremorne walk-in wardrobe storage
image:image.image:caption: The walk-in robe used slim shaker detailing, Polytec Boston Oak and polyurethane shelving and drawers for a premium but practical result.

image:image.image:title: Cremorne laundry cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Laundry joinery combined top and bottom storage with an undermount stainless steel sink in a compact, hard-working layout.

image:image.image:title: Cremorne vanity joinery
image:image.image:caption: The vanity joinery carried the same clean detailing into the bathroom, with full-height storage and concealed utility space.

image:image.image:title: Cremorne before joinery installation
image:image.image:caption: Before installation showing the base structure of the space.

image:image.image:title: Croydon apartment renovation with compact custom joinery
image:image.image:caption: Croydon project hero image

image:image.image:title: Croydon apartment kitchen wide view
image:image.image:caption: Wide view of the completed Croydon kitchen showing the full run of cabinetry and island layout.

image:image.image:title: Croydon apartment kitchen cabinetry detail
image:image.image:caption: Cabinetry detail from the finished Croydon apartment kitchen renovation.

image:image.image:title: Croydon apartment kitchen before renovation
image:image.image:caption: The Croydon apartment kitchen before renovation, showing the original timber cabinetry and layout.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst custom kitchen with timber-look joinery and stone splashback
image:image.image:caption: Darlinghurst project hero image

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst kitchen island with stone feature splashback
image:image.image:caption: The kitchen used warm timber-look joinery and a striking stone backdrop to make a compact footprint feel more substantial.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst kitchen island with pendant lighting
image:image.image:caption: The kitchen island with pendant lighting anchors the living side of the open plan and gives the room a clear focal point.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst hidden servery and pantry joinery
image:image.image:caption: A concealed servery and pantry zone kept the everyday mess off display while still being easy to access.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst Murphy bed integrated into custom joinery wall
image:image.image:caption: The Murphy bed let a single room perform more than one role, with cabinetry designed to keep the room calm whether the bed was in use or packed away.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst Murphy bed and wardrobe wall with bed folded away
image:image.image:caption: With the bed folded away, the full wardrobe wall reads as a clean, resolved storage elevation that keeps the room feeling open.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst concealed laundry with stacked appliances
image:image.image:caption: The hidden laundry used stacked appliances and Blum pocket doors so the joinery could open wide for use and close neatly after.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst hallway wall cladding and concealed storage
image:image.image:caption: Hallway cladding gave a simple circulation space a much more finished architectural feel.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst vanity with warm timber joinery and stone top
image:image.image:caption: The vanity carried the same material language into the bathroom so the fitout felt joined up rather than room-by-room.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst wardrobe joinery in timber-look finish
image:image.image:caption: The wardrobe joinery used a simple, tailored front elevation to keep the room feeling uncluttered.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst Murphy bed closed — full-height Boston Oak joinery wall
image:image.image:caption: Murphy bed fully closed. The Boston Oak joinery reads as one unbroken wall — no handles, no visible bed mechanism, just a clean full-height elevation that holds its own in the room.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst hallway wall cladding in Boston Oak Polytec Chifley with wall sconces
image:image.image:caption: The hallway cladding in Boston Oak Polytec Chifley gives the entire circulation zone the same resolved material language as the cabinetry throughout the home.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst corridor wall cladding running full length to front door
image:image.image:caption: Wall cladding running the full corridor length ties the entry sequence into a single architecturally finished surface — no painted plasterboard breaks the material story.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst hallway cladding with natural light from front door and exposed brick contrast
image:image.image:caption: Daytime light from the front entry catches the Boston Oak grain against the original sandstock brick — a deliberate contrast between the raw heritage fabric and the new precision joinery.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst cladding wrapping from hallway into kitchen zone
image:image.image:caption: The cladding wraps from the hallway into the kitchen zone, integrating the transition between spaces behind a continuous face.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst Boston Oak wall cladding three-wall corner detail
image:image.image:caption: Three-wall corner detail — panels meeting cleanly at internal angles, flush and shadow-line tight throughout.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst kitchen during build phase
image:image.image:caption: The kitchen started mid-build, showing the constraints of the apartment footprint before the joinery and finishes came together.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst apartment before final kitchen joinery
image:image.image:caption: Early build-stage photos show how open and unresolved the living zone felt before the joinery started defining the space.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst room before Murphy bed joinery installation
image:image.image:caption: The future Murphy bed room began as a basic open room with very little storage or flexibility.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst laundry nook before concealed joinery
image:image.image:caption: The laundry zone was exposed and awkward before being wrapped in joinery and hidden behind pocketing doors.

image:image.image:title: Darlinghurst hallway before cladding and concealed storage
image:image.image:caption: The hallway cladding was as much about resolution and finish as it was about concealment.

image:image.image:title: Epping open-plan joinery fitout with kitchen, living area and timber screening
image:image.image:caption: Epping project hero image

image:image.image:title: Epping handleless kitchen in Laminex Sublime Teak with stone benchtop and integrated appliances
image:image.image:caption: Handleless kitchen with fingerpull profile — Laminex Sublime Teak cabinetry, stone benchtop and integrated appliances running the full length of the wall.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen island with stone top and timber base cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Island bench with stone top and matching timber base — the centrepiece of the open-plan zone with the pantry and oven wall visible behind.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen oven tower and full-height cabinetry in Sublime Teak
image:image.image:caption: Full-height oven tower and tall cabinetry in Sublime Teak — clean, handleless lines from floor to ceiling.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen detail showing fingerpull profile on lower drawers
image:image.image:caption: Fingerpull detail on the lower drawers — the handleless profile keeps the cabinetry clean while staying practical every day.

image:image.image:title: Epping open-plan kitchen and dining zone with herringbone floor and full-width glazing
image:image.image:caption: Kitchen and dining zone with herringbone flooring and full-width glazing — the joinery sets the tone for the whole open-plan space.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen sink and splashback detail with overhead cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Sink and splashback run with overhead cabinetry in Sublime Teak — functional layout with clean lines throughout.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen corner view showing integrated rangehood and cabinetry layout
image:image.image:caption: Corner view showing integrated rangehood and the full cabinetry run — everything flush and integrated within the same panel line.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen overview with stone island bench, Sublime Teak cabinetry and living zone beyond
image:image.image:caption: Overview of the kitchen with stone island, timber cabinetry and the living zone beyond — the whole floor plan connected through one material direction.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen lower cabinetry drawers and base units in handleless Sublime Teak
image:image.image:caption: Lower cabinetry with deep drawers and handleless fronts — the fingerpull runs consistently across all base units.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen wall cabinetry and benchtop with stone and timber detail
image:image.image:caption: Wall cabinetry and benchtop detail — stone and timber working together across the full run of the kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Epping butler's pantry with open shelving, stone splashback nook and bar storage
image:image.image:caption: Butler’s pantry with adjustable open shelving, a stone splashback nook and dedicated bar storage — keeps the main kitchen clear while giving everything a proper home.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchenette with full-height timber cabinetry, oven and fluted folding door
image:image.image:caption: Secondary kitchenette with full-height Sublime Teak cabinetry and integrated oven — separated from the entry by a fluted folding door and finished to the same standard as the main kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Epping secondary kitchen zone with full timber cabinetry, sink and small dining setting
image:image.image:caption: Secondary kitchen zone with full-height cabinetry, integrated sink and a small dining setting — self-contained and carrying the same finish as the main kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Epping study nook with 60mm floating shelves and built-in timber desk in Sublime Teak
image:image.image:caption: Study nook with 60mm thick floating shelves and a 60mm thick benchtop in Sublime Teak — the extra thickness makes a real difference to how the joinery reads in the space.

image:image.image:title: Epping study built-in desk and shelving with centre drawers
image:image.image:caption: Built-in desk with centre drawers and open shelving above — a proper work zone sized to fit the room without overwhelming it.

image:image.image:title: Epping study joinery detail showing floating shelf thickness and timber grain
image:image.image:caption: Shelf detail — the 60mm thickness gives the floating shelves a presence that standard 16mm board shelving simply doesn’t have.

image:image.image:title: Epping study nook full view with desk, shelves and living zone
image:image.image:caption: Full view of the study nook sitting within the open-plan living zone — contained, useful and matched to the rest of the home.

image:image.image:title: Epping study nook cabinetry and lounge area with Sublime Teak joinery
image:image.image:caption: The study nook and lounge zone in one frame — the joinery anchors the space without carving the floor plan into separate rooms.

image:image.image:title: Epping built-in wardrobe with full-height Sublime Teak doors and internal fittings
image:image.image:caption: Built-in wardrobe with full-height Sublime Teak doors — same handleless profile as the kitchen, same material direction carried through to the bedroom.

image:image.image:title: Epping wardrobe internal view with hanging rail, shelves and drawers
image:image.image:caption: Internal wardrobe layout with hanging rail, adjustable shelves and drawers — fitted out properly rather than left as an empty carcass.

image:image.image:title: Epping wardrobe door detail in Laminex Sublime Teak with fingerpull profile
image:image.image:caption: Door detail — Sublime Teak with fingerpull profile, matching the kitchen cabinetry on the other side of the home.

image:image.image:title: Epping bedroom with built-in wardrobe and matching timber joinery
image:image.image:caption: Bedroom view with the built-in wardrobe in position — the timber finish ties the bedroom back to the kitchen and living zone.

image:image.image:title: Epping wardrobe overview showing full run of cabinetry across bedroom wall
image:image.image:caption: Full wardrobe run across the bedroom wall — measured to fit the room and designed to feel built-in rather than added on.

image:image.image:title: Epping laundry with Sublime Teak cabinetry, stone benchtop and integrated appliances
image:image.image:caption: Laundry with Sublime Teak overhead and base cabinetry, stone benchtop and integrated washer and dryer — the same finish as the kitchen, not an afterthought.

image:image.image:title: Epping laundry joinery detail with upper cabinetry and utility storage
image:image.image:caption: Laundry upper cabinetry detail — practical storage with the same handleless profile and timber finish running through from the rest of the home.

image:image.image:title: Epping bathroom with freestanding bath, reeded timber vanity, vessel sink and brass tapware
image:image.image:caption: Main bathroom with freestanding bath, reeded floating vanity, vessel sink, brass tapware and backlit round mirror — the timber finish carried through from the kitchen at the same level of quality.

image:image.image:title: Epping bathroom vanity and mirror detail with Sublime Teak reeded front and brass fixtures
image:image.image:caption: Vanity detail — reeded Sublime Teak front with vessel sink and brass tapware. The reeding adds texture without breaking the material consistency of the home.

image:image.image:title: Epping new-build shell before any joinery installation — bare framing and plasterboard
image:image.image:caption: Bare new-build shell before installation started — raw framing and plasterboard, nothing fitted.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen carcasses being set during early installation
image:image.image:caption: Early installation stage — carcasses being set before doors, benchtops or finishes were fitted.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen cabinetry structure mid-installation showing carcass layout
image:image.image:caption: Mid-installation — the carcass structure in place with the layout locked in before fronts and finishes went on.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen zone during early installation — first carcasses being set on bare shell
image:image.image:caption: First carcasses going in — the whole kitchen and living zone mapped out before a single door or benchtop was fitted.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen upper and lower carcasses being set out during installation
image:image.image:caption: Upper and lower carcasses being set out — the layout taking shape before doors and fronts went on.

image:image.image:title: Epping kitchen carcasses installed with drawers and tall units in position before fit-off
image:image.image:caption: Carcasses, drawer runners and tall units all in position — the structure of the joinery fully set before the final fronts and finishes were fitted.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen renovation with green-tile splashback and custom cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Glebe project hero image

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen cabinetry and appliance detail
image:image.image:caption: Closer view of the Glebe kitchen showing the updated cabinet runs, dishwasher integration and tiled splashback.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen storage and drawer detail
image:image.image:caption: Storage detail from the Glebe kitchen showing the renewed cabinet layout and drawer configuration.

image:image.image:title: Glebe cooktop and splashback detail
image:image.image:caption: Cooktop zone from the Glebe kitchen renovation with tiled splashback and new rangehood detail.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen sink and benchtop detail
image:image.image:caption: Sink and benchtop detail from the completed Glebe kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Wide view of the finished Glebe kitchen
image:image.image:caption: Wider view of the completed Glebe kitchen showing how the joinery cleaned up the room layout.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen before renovation
image:image.image:caption: The original Glebe kitchen before the cabinetry, splashback and layout refresh.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen before updated cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Another view of the Glebe kitchen before the new joinery and appliance layout were completed.

image:image.image:title: Glebe kitchen before splashback and cabinetry upgrade
image:image.image:caption: Pre-renovation view showing the older kitchen before the joinery upgrade.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park home renovation with kitchen and living-room joinery
image:image.image:caption: Harrington Park project hero image

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park living room with built-in fireplace joinery
image:image.image:caption: Living-room joinery and fireplace wall detail from the Harrington Park renovation.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park kitchen island and cabinetry detail
image:image.image:caption: Another kitchen angle showing the island, storage and integrated appliance runs.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park bar and fireplace cabinetry detail
image:image.image:caption: Built-in bar and fireplace cabinetry detail from the Harrington Park home renovation.

image:image.image:title: Finished Harrington Park living room joinery
image:image.image:caption: Finished living-room view showing how the joinery and renovation details work together.

image:image.image:title: Finished Harrington Park kitchen joinery
image:image.image:caption: Another completed kitchen view from Harrington Park with island seating and full-height storage.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park kitchen before renovation
image:image.image:caption: The kitchen before the new joinery, island redesign and skylight-led renovation.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park living and dining area before renovation
image:image.image:caption: Open-plan living area before the new joinery and renovation works were completed.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park kitchen before cabinetry upgrade
image:image.image:caption: Another early view of the Harrington Park kitchen before the fitted joinery package.

image:image.image:title: Harrington Park room before renovation detailing
image:image.image:caption: Pre-renovation room view before the new built-in joinery and finishes were installed.

image:image.image:title: James Lane Moore Park curved wall fitout and retail display installation
image:image.image:caption: Moore Park project hero image

image:image.image:title: Completed curved display wall at James Lane Moore Park showroom
image:image.image:caption: Finished curved display wall installed and ready in the James Lane Moore Park showroom.

image:image.image:title: James Lane Moore Park completed showroom display area
image:image.image:caption: Completed furniture display area after the James Lane Moore Park fitout was finished.

image:image.image:title: Curved wall framing and set-up inside the factory
image:image.image:caption: Curved wall framing set out and fabricated in the workshop before delivery to the Moore Park site.

image:image.image:title: James Lane Moore Park curved wall framing on site — setting out detail
image:image.image:caption: Curved framing set out on site — the precision at this stage determines how cleanly the finished wall sits.

image:image.image:title: James Lane Moore Park curved wall after lining — ready for fit-off
image:image.image:caption: Curved feature wall after lining, shaped and ready for the final joinery fit-off stage.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea kitchen renovation with new island, dark lower cabinetry and white uppers
image:image.image:caption: Lurnea project hero image

image:image.image:title: Lurnea kitchen full U-shape view with island and new cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Full U-shape kitchen view showing the new island, cabinetry layout and how the space opened up after the renovation.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea kitchen island foreground with new joinery and appliances
image:image.image:caption: Island in the foreground with the full kitchen run behind — the stone benchtop and dark lower cabinetry carrying through the whole layout.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea kitchen before renovation showing original layout
image:image.image:caption: The original Lurnea kitchen layout before the renovation, showing the existing cabinetry and appliance positions.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea kitchen before renovation from opposite angle
image:image.image:caption: Another view of the original Lurnea kitchen before the new joinery and island were installed.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea original kitchen before renovation — wide view with fridge
image:image.image:caption: The original Lurnea kitchen before renovation — beige cabinetry, laminate doors and the old layout that was stripped out.

image:image.image:title: Lurnea original kitchen sink side before renovation
image:image.image:caption: Sink side of the original Lurnea kitchen showing the old benchtop, cabinetry and layout before the renovation began.

image:image.image:title: Monterey kitchen with stone island, oven stack and full-height cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Monterey project hero image

image:image.image:title: Monterey kitchen full-height oven stack and tall pantry cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Full-height oven stack with double ovens and tall pantry cabinetry alongside — the appliance wall designed to hold everything without breaking the clean handleless front.

image:image.image:title: Monterey kitchen sink side with dishwasher, drawers and window splashback
image:image.image:caption: Sink side of the kitchen — dishwasher integration, finger-pull drawers, stone benchtop and overhead cabinets running the full length of the window.

image:image.image:title: Monterey butler’s pantry with L-shape walk-in shelving
image:image.image:caption: Walk-in butler’s pantry with L-shape open shelving — enough depth and height to keep the main kitchen completely clear.

image:image.image:title: Monterey wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors and brass hardware — front view
image:image.image:caption: Wardrobe joinery with full-height black framed ribbed glass doors and brass handles — a strong design statement that works just as hard as the kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Monterey wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors — angle view showing depth
image:image.image:caption: Angle view of the wardrobe showing the depth of the joinery and how the ribbed glass panels sit within the black frame on three sides.

image:image.image:title: Mosman floor-to-ceiling wardrobes with integrated storage
image:image.image:caption: Mosman project hero image

image:image.image:title: Mosman wardrobe shelving and display storage
image:image.image:caption: Shelving and display storage detail from the Mosman wardrobe fitout.

image:image.image:title: Mosman full-height wardrobe joinery
image:image.image:caption: Full-height wardrobe joinery in Mosman with contrasting dark internals and lighter outer panels.

image:image.image:title: Completed Mosman wardrobe wall
image:image.image:caption: Completed wardrobe wall in Mosman with oak-look panels and open shelving.

image:image.image:title: Mosman built-in wardrobe with hanging section
image:image.image:caption: Built-in wardrobe in Mosman showing the hanging section and integrated storage.

image:image.image:title: Mosman wardrobe panel and overhead storage detail
image:image.image:caption: Panel and overhead storage detail from the Mosman wardrobe project.

image:image.image:title: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with island, white shaker cabinetry and tall appliance wall
image:image.image:caption: Neutral Bay project hero image

image:image.image:title: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with drawers, splashback and wine fridge
image:image.image:caption: Finished kitchen angle showing the benchtop run, drawer storage, splashback detail and integrated wine fridge.

image:image.image:title: Wide finished Neutral Bay kitchen view with island and appliance wall
image:image.image:caption: Alternate wide kitchen view showing the island, appliance wall and the overall completed layout.

image:image.image:title: Neutral Bay kitchen corner storage pullout detail
image:image.image:caption: Corner storage detail from the finished Neutral Bay kitchen showing the internal hardware and custom joinery access.

image:image.image:title: Finished Neutral Bay laundry with tall storage cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Finished laundry joinery showing the tall storage cabinet, bench run and completed cabinetry finish.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy kitchen remodel with study nook and living-room storage
image:image.image:caption: Pemulwuy project hero image

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy study nook from a wider angle
image:image.image:caption: Another view of the completed Pemulwuy study nook showing the full cabinetry and desk run.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy study nook with built-in desk and storage
image:image.image:caption: Study nook joinery in Pemulwuy with a built-in desk, overhead storage and a compact work zone.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy living room with study nook joinery in background
image:image.image:caption: Living room view showing how the Pemulwuy study nook joinery sits within the open-plan layout.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy kitchen from living area
image:image.image:caption: Kitchen view from the living area showing the completed cabinetry and open-plan layout.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy room before study nook fitout
image:image.image:caption: Empty room before the Pemulwuy study nook and storage fitout was installed.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy open-plan area during renovation
image:image.image:caption: Open-plan area during renovation showing the kitchen and living space before the joinery was installed.

image:image.image:title: Pemulwuy room before fitout
image:image.image:caption: Another before view of the Pemulwuy space prior to the joinery fitout.

image:image.image:title: Rosemeadow kitchen renovation with white shaker-style cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Rosemeadow project hero image

image:image.image:title: Rosemeadow kitchen bench and storage wall
image:image.image:caption: Bench and storage wall detail from the Rosemeadow kitchen renovation.

image:image.image:title: Vaucluse apartment kitchen remodel with timber cabinetry and green splashback
image:image.image:caption: Vaucluse project hero image

image:image.image:title: Vaucluse kitchen entry and island detail
image:image.image:caption: Entry view into the completed Vaucluse kitchen, showing the island and appliance wall.

image:image.image:title: Vaucluse galley kitchen with skylight and white joinery
image:image.image:caption: Longer galley view from the Vaucluse kitchen showing the skylight, white cabinetry and timber-look joinery.

image:image.image:title: Vaucluse kitchen early installation stage — carcasses being set out
image:image.image:caption: Early installation stage showing the Vaucluse kitchen carcasses being set out before doors and finishes were added.

image:image.image:title: Vaucluse galley kitchen during joinery installation
image:image.image:caption: Galley kitchen during installation, showing the cabinet runs taking shape before the final finishes and hardware were fitted.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen renovation — marble island benchtop with handleless shaker cabinetry in Dulux Lamb's Ear Half polyurethane
image:image.image:caption: Willoughby project hero image

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen — view from island toward fridge, oven tower and window
image:image.image:caption: View from the island looking toward the fridge, oven tower and window — shows the full depth of the kitchen layout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen — sink wall, overhead cabinets and oven tower
image:image.image:caption: Sink wall with overhead cabinetry, marble splashback, gas cooktop and integrated oven tower — all in the same shaker profile and finish.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen island angle — marble benchtop with oven tower in background
image:image.image:caption: Island angle looking toward the oven tower — shows how the island sits within the kitchen and the consistency of the joinery throughout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen island benchtop detail — marble surface and shaker cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Close view of the marble island benchtop with the shaker cabinetry behind — the finger-pull groove detail visible across all drawer fronts.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen renovation completed — full width showing island and cabinetry run
image:image.image:caption: The completed kitchen showing the full L-shape layout with integrated island, handleless finger-pull shaker doors and drawers throughout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen — handleless shaker cabinetry in Dulux Lamb's Ear Half polyurethane
image:image.image:caption: Kitchen cabinetry in Dulux Lamb's Ear Half polyurethane with hidden finger-groove detailing running consistently across all doors and drawers.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen island angle showing finger-pull groove detail
image:image.image:caption: The integrated finger-pull groove runs across all doors, drawers and the pantry door — keeping the shaker profile clean without hardware.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen cabinetry detail — joinery finish and profile
image:image.image:caption: Cabinetry detail showing the consistency of the shaker profile and finish quality across the kitchen joinery.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby single vanity with custom floating joinery and mirrored storage
image:image.image:caption: Single vanity with floating joinery and mirrored storage above — same detailing language carried through from the kitchen.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby double basin vanity with curved open shelving
image:image.image:caption: Double basin vanity with curved open shelving on both ends and mirrored storage cabinets above.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby single basin floating vanity — timber drawer and marble benchtop
image:image.image:caption: Single basin floating vanity with timber drawer cabinet and marble benchtop — photographed with natural light from the high window above.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby double basin vanity — timber floating cabinet with mirrored shaving cabinet
image:image.image:caption: Double basin vanity with timber floating cabinet, mirrored shaving cabinet above and marble benchtop — photographed from the bathroom entry.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry renovation — full-height cabinetry and overhead storage
image:image.image:caption: Laundry joinery with full-height overhead storage and a resolved utility layout — practical without being an afterthought.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry cabinetry storage detail
image:image.image:caption: Laundry storage detail from the Willoughby fitout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry — overhead cabinetry and marble splashback wide view
image:image.image:caption: Laundry showing the full run of overhead cabinetry with marble splashback and base cabinets below — white polyurethane finish throughout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry corner — full-height cabinetry with marble splashback
image:image.image:caption: Corner angle of the laundry showing the full cabinet height, marble splashback and how the joinery wraps the room.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry L-shape layout — sink, marble benchtop and tall pantry column
image:image.image:caption: The L-shape laundry run with undermount sink, marble benchtop, marble splashback and a full-height pantry column — clean and functional.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry — full room view showing cabinetry, window and floor
image:image.image:caption: Full room view of the laundry from the doorway — white cabinetry running floor to ceiling with natural light from the window.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby white polyurethane built-in wardrobe — bedroom context with pendant light
image:image.image:caption: Full-height white polyurethane built-in wardrobe in the bedroom — flush doors, no hardware, clean lines from floor to ceiling.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby white wardrobe with drawers below — bedroom with pendant light
image:image.image:caption: White polyurethane wardrobe with upper doors and drawer bank below — photographed from the bedroom showing the full wall of storage.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby Coastal Oak wardrobe — full height with drawers, natural light from window
image:image.image:caption: Coastal Oak Woodmatt wardrobe with full-height doors and a bank of drawers at the base — natural light from the window beside it.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby Coastal Oak wardrobe — wide bedroom angle with timber finish
image:image.image:caption: Wider bedroom angle showing the Coastal Oak wardrobe in context — timber grain finish with drawer storage below, sitting beside the window.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby mudroom hallway joinery — white built-in storage with sliding door
image:image.image:caption: Hallway joinery with white built-in storage and sliding door — shows how the fitout extends beyond the main rooms into the entry sequence.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby mudroom joinery — bench seating and overhead storage
image:image.image:caption: Mudroom joinery with bench seating, hooks and overhead storage at the home entry — white satin polyurethane with an oak-look benchtop.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen before renovation — original layout
image:image.image:caption: The original Willoughby kitchen before the new cabinetry, layout and finish upgrade.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby kitchen before renovation — existing cabinet detail
image:image.image:caption: Existing kitchen before the renovation showing the original cabinet doors and bench layout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby laundry before renovation
image:image.image:caption: The existing laundry before the new cabinetry and storage fitout.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby wardrobe area before built-in joinery
image:image.image:caption: The original wardrobe area before the custom built-in storage was installed.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby secondary wardrobe area before joinery
image:image.image:caption: Secondary wardrobe area before the custom joinery package was installed.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby entry and mudroom before joinery
image:image.image:caption: The entry and mudroom area before the new joinery package.

image:image.image:title: Willoughby vanity area before renovation
image:image.image:caption: The bathroom vanity area before the updated joinery and finish work.

image:image.image:title: Premium bathroom renovation — vanity, freestanding bath and timber cabinetry
image:image.image:caption: Premium bathroom renovation — vanity, freestanding bath and timber cabinetry
